emails.subject: Congestion Pricing & Forecasting program
emails.body: I would like to go to this conference/tutorial on Congestion modeling and management. Is that OK, or would you prefer somebody else to go? Thanks, Vasant Forwarded by Vasant Shanbhogue/HOU/ECT on 01/19/2001 05:38 PM Infocast <mail@infocastinc.com> on 01/19/2001 03:58:13 PM

emails.subject: Re: Congestion Pricing & Forecasting program
emails.body: Re: Congestion Pricing Forecasting program Vasant, No problem. Vince Vasant Shanbhogue 01/19/2001 05:48 PM
